name: Inayat Kang
tagline: Exploring the intersection of technology, medicine, and human potential.
about: I'm an 18-year-old from Calgary with an ambition to create positive change in the world through empathy-based innovations.

I appreciate perspective in life to overcome adversity and approach opportunties with a creative lens. I embody a growth mindset where I am constantly challenging myself to go beyond my comfort zone and expand my knowledge. I'm working towards making a difference in the world by bridging technology and medicine, aiming to improve global healthcare standards around the world. This pursuit has allowed me to adopt an empathy-focused mindset and build projects that center on the user's needs. I'm optimistic about the future and passionate about helping build it!
